title: Nutty Peruvian Tahini Stir-fry
description: A meal-prep friendly dish featuring a nutty and tender combination of tahini with Turkish delight-like textures.
instructions: Toast almonds in a dry skillet over medium heat for about 5 minutes or until lightly golden.
In a separate pan, mix tahini with water (1 tablespoon per cup of tahini) to create a smooth sauce. Add crushed Turkish delight and stir well.
Add chopped almonds and tomatoes to the sauce mixture and simmer for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Stir in diced bell pepper and minced garlic, cook for about 5 more minutes until vegetables are tender but not mushy.
Serve hot as a side dish or on top of brown rice or quinoa.
